// Source: https://github.com/farzahn/proffie/blob/main/ProffieOS/config/ff-kotor.h
// Fett263 OS7.14 v2.242p — Revan Multi Phase 4-color (Color Change toggle)
// 4 phases: Hyper Rotoscope OT purple / Prequels green / Sequels blue / Subtle red.
// Uses COLOR_CHANGE_DIRECT click-to-cycle. Includes preon overload + powerup unstable.
StylePtr<Layers<Black,ColorChange<TrSelect<Ifon<Int<1>,Int<0>>,TrInstant,TrFadeX<Int<1000>>>,Mix<HoldPeakF<SwingSpeed<250>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<50>,Int<500>>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<>,Int<20000>,Int<10000>>>,RandomFlicker<StripesX<Int<15000>,Scale<HoldPeakF<SwingSpeed<200>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<50>,Int<300>>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<24000>,Int<16000>>>,Int<-3200>,Int<-200>>,Rgb<118,0,194>,Rgb<118,0,194>,Mix<Int<7710>,Black,Rgb<118,0,194>>,Rgb<118,0,194>,Mix<Int<19276>,Black,Rgb<118,0,194>>>,Rgb<118,0,194>>,Rgb<118,0,194>>,Mix<HoldPeakF<SwingSpeed<250>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<50>,Int<500>>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<>,Int<20000>,Int<10000>>>,RandomFlicker<StripesX<Int<24000>,Scale<HoldPeakF<SwingSpeed<200>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<50>,Int<300>>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<24000>,Int<16000>>>,Int<-1400>,Int<-100>>,Rgb<0,255,0>,Rgb<0,255,0>,Mix<Int<7710>,Black,Rgb<0,255,0>>,Rgb<0,255,0>,Mix<Int<19276>,Black,Rgb<0,255,0>>>,Rgb<0,255,0>>,Rgb<0,255,0>>,Mix<HoldPeakF<SwingSpeed<250>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<50>,Int<500>>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<>,Int<20000>,Int<10000>>>,RandomFlicker<StripesX<Int<14000>,Scale<HoldPeakF<SwingSpeed<200>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<50>,Int<300>>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<24000>,Int<16000>>>,Int<-4000>,Int<-400>>,Rgb<0,0,255>,Rgb<0,0,255>,Mix<Int<7710>,Black,Rgb<0,0,255>>,Rgb<0,0,255>,Mix<Int<19276>,Black,Rgb<0,0,255>>>,Rgb<0,0,255>>,Rgb<0,0,255>>,Mix<HoldPeakF<SwingSpeed<250>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<100>,Int<50>,Int<500>>,Scale<SwingAcceleration<>,Int<20000>,Int<10000>>>,Mix<Sin<Int<16>,Int<32768>,Int<18000>>,Rgb<255,0,0>,Stripes<12000,-200,Rgb<255,0,0>,Mix<Int<20000>,Black,Rgb<255,0,0>>,Rgb<255,0,0>,Mix<Int<16448>,Black,Rgb<255,0,0>>>>,Rgb<255,0,0>>>,InOutTrL<TrWipeX<BendTimePowInvX<IgnitionTime<300>,Mult<IntArg<IGNITION_OPTION2_ARG,10992>,Int<98304>>>>,TrWipeInX<BendTimePowInvX<RetractionTime<0>,Mult<IntArg<RETRACTION_OPTION2_ARG,10992>,Int<98304>>>>,Black>>>()
